name: Butterscotch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Put packed brown sugar and margarine in a pan and brown.
2. Add 1/2 cup of water slowly and cook until the sugar dissolves.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining brown sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
4. Heat the can of evaporated milk.
5. In a separate bowl, mix egg yolks and milk.
6. Add the egg/milk mixture to the dry ingredient mixture.
7. Pour the hot sugar mixture into the heating milk.
8. Add the egg mixture.
9. Cook until thick.
10. Pour into the baked crust.
11. In a separate bowl, make meringue by beating egg whites with an electric mixer.
12. Slowly add sugar and beat until light and fluffy and stiff peaks form.
13. Top pie filling with meringue and bake until meringue is golden brown.
